name: Payments Operations Excellence Agent Stack
description: Optimises end-to-end payments processing: reduces exceptions, improves STP rates, and ensures real-time compliance with scheme rules across CHAPS, Faster Payments, SEPA, and SWIFT rails.
features: Payment ingestion + scheme-rule validation across CHAPS / FPS / SEPA / SWIFT
Sanctions screening against OFAC / HMT / EU lists
Exception handling with Copilot-assisted cause analysis + repair playbook
Customer-query resolution with real-time payment status
Payments analytics: volumes, STP rates, scheme-compliance KPIs
benefits: Higher straight-through-processing rate across payment rails
Faster resolution of customer payment queries
starters: Show me today's STP rate by payment rail
Why did this CHAPS payment fail validation?
What is our nostro position reconciliation status?
Track payment reference 12345 and explain its current state

components.name: payment_ingestion_validator_agent.py
components.description: Validates payment against scheme rules (CHAPS / FPS / SEPA / SWIFT).

components.name: sanctions_screening_agent.py
components.description: Screens parties against OFAC / HMT / EU lists.

components.name: payment_exception_repair_agent.py
components.description: Diagnoses payment-failure root cause + repair playbook.

components.name: nostro_reconciliation_agent.py
components.description: Reconciles internal payment-position to nostro statement.

components.name: payment_status_tracker_agent.py
components.description: Returns lifecycle state of a payment by reference.

components.name: payments_analytics_agent.py
components.description: STP rate, volume, scheme-compliance KPIs by rail.

useCases: Show me today's STP rate by payment rail
Why did this CHAPS payment fail validation?
What is our nostro position reconciliation status?
Track payment reference 12345 and explain its current state
